title: Intriguing Creamy Kenyan Squid Pasta
description: A sweet and creamy Kenyan dish featuring squid and pasta, perfect for a brunch mood, this ovo-vegetarian friendly recipe is a must try.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the pasta according to the package instructions until al dente.
In a large skillet, melt the butter over medium heat and saute the onion and garlic until softened.
Add the squid rings to the skillet and cook for 2-3 minutes until opaque and tender.
In a large bowl, whisk together the heavy cream, eggs, paprika, salt, and black pepper.
Add the cooked pasta to the bowl and toss with the cream mixture until the pasta is well coated.
Add the cooked squid to the bowl and toss with the pasta and cream mixture until well combined.
Return the skillet to medium heat and add the pasta and squid mixture, cooking for an additional 2 minutes until heated through.
Serve the creamy squid pasta hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley or cilantro if desired.
